name: crevideo-reach
description: Crevideo Reach creator-outreach toolkit — 9 skills (1 base playbook `mcp-playbook` + 8 business-scenario skills: creator fit scoring / tier resolver / offer policy / brand safety / outreach composer / reply triage / win-back & pruning / performance diagnosis) + Crevideo Reach MCP server (74 tools, OAuth sign-in).

interface.longDescription: 9 skills + Crevideo Reach MCP (74 tools) packaged as a plugin. Covers creator fit scoring, tier resolution, offer & policy checks, brand safety, outreach drafting, reply triage, win-back & pruning, and performance diagnosis — backed by MCP for automations, creator pool, DM, and email.
